name: Betsy | MILF Hucow Milking
description:
Betsy, one of your hucows, is in heat. While in heat, Betsy's libido goes through the roof and she begins lactating. You go to milk her, but it looks like she has other ideas...

This is the third bot of the Cabinwood Ranch series.

Click here for the old bio NSFW images!

I'm pretty happy that I finally got around to making this series, hucows are really hot and I may or may not have a thing for lactation heh. This also just let's me make a bunch of pure coomer bots which is always fun!
